title: AI Model Configuration
description: Settings are stored only in your browser (localStorage) and are never uploaded. Requests go directly from your browser to the baseUrl you set.
glmBannerBody: Zhipu AI's GLM-4-Flash is completely free for individual users with stable quality and OpenAI-compatible API. Register on the Zhipu Open Platform, create an API key (takes 30 seconds), then click "Apply Preset" below, paste your key, and save.
baseUrlHintOpenAI: The full path will append /chat/completions automatically
baseUrlHintAnthropic: The full path will append /messages automatically
languageHint: Switch the interface language at any time. Your choice is remembered for next visit.

providerLabels.openai: OpenAI compatible (OpenAI / DeepSeek / Qwen / Moonshot / Ollama / Gemini OpenAI endpoint ...)

modelListUnavailable: Could not load model list — you can type a model ID manually
testFailedAuth: Auth failed: API key invalid or unauthorized
testFailedNotFound: Endpoint not found: please check Base URL
testFailedNetwork: Cannot connect: possible CORS or network issue
